name: Diplomatic Robe
description: Notes This robe has reduced defense and sacrifices stats such as MP and WIS, but more than compensates with a good HP bonus and a huge spike in damage output, the highest of all robes bar the Vesture of Duality with its proc active.
effects: On Ability Use: Summon a portal which deals 125 damage and zaps enemies in a radius of 5 every 0.4 seconds Duration: 4 seconds Cooldown: 8 seconds
